SEARCH
Package org.fluentjdbc

Class DbContextStatement

java.lang.Object
org.fluentjdbc.DbContextStatement
All Implemented Interfaces:
DbContextSelectResult
public class DbContextStatement extends Object implements DbContextSelectResult
Used to execute an arbitrary statement. Create with DbContext.statement(String, Collection).

Example

 dbContext.statement(
      "update orders set quantity = quantity + 1 WHERE customer_id = ?",
      Arrays.asList(customerId)
 ).executeUpdate();

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    executeUpdate()
    Calls prepareStatement(String) with the statement, DatabaseStatement.bindParameters(PreparedStatement, Collection), converting each parameter in the process and executes the statement
    <OBJECT> SingleRow<OBJECT>
    singleObject(DatabaseResult.RowMapper<OBJECT> mapper)
    If the query returns no rows, returns SingleRow.absent(java.util.function.Supplier<EX>), if exactly one row is returned, maps it and return it, if more than one is returned, throws `IllegalStateException`
    <OBJECT> Stream<OBJECT>
    stream(DatabaseResult.RowMapper<OBJECT> mapper)
    Execute the query and map each return value over the DatabaseResult.RowMapper function to return a stream.

  • Method Details

    • singleObject

      @Nonnull @CheckReturnValue public <OBJECT> SingleRow<OBJECT> singleObject(DatabaseResult.RowMapper<OBJECT> mapper)
      If the query returns no rows, returns SingleRow.absent(java.util.function.Supplier<EX>), if exactly one row is returned, maps it and return it, if more than one is returned, throws `IllegalStateException`
      Specified by:
      singleObject in interface DbContextSelectResult
      Parameters:
      mapper - Function object to map a single returned row to an object
      Returns:
      the mapped row if one row is returned, SingleRow.absent(java.util.function.Supplier<EX>) otherwise
      Throws:
      MultipleRowsReturnedException - if more than one row was matched the query

    • stream

      @CheckReturnValue public <OBJECT> Stream<OBJECT> stream(DatabaseResult.RowMapper<OBJECT> mapper)
      Execute the query and map each return value over the DatabaseResult.RowMapper function to return a stream. Example: 
           table.where("status", status).stream(row -> row.getInstant("created_at"))
      Specified by:
      stream in interface DbContextSelectResult

    • executeUpdate

      public int executeUpdate()
      Calls prepareStatement(String) with the statement, DatabaseStatement.bindParameters(PreparedStatement, Collection), converting each parameter in the process and executes the statement
